description: Composition Grey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, embroidery in the background with screen print on the front exuding an embossed effect, and has felt tape lining on the inside of the neck Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments If brand lee launched itself in a big way to create great work wear for women, it also ensured to dole out some of the most fashionable leisure wear too. And one such outcome is this t-shirt from lee. Revel in the fineries of art, music and film on weekends with this tee, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The stylish embossing on the screen print on the front, coupled with the print makes this T-shirt a true piece of art. Team this with jeans or skirts and chill out in style. Grab your tee right away, before you find your neighbour wearing one too. *This product is developed with the unique multiple hand processes method. Slight peeling of the print post home laundry is absolutely normal, giving it a vintage look, and hence should not be considered as a defect. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"
